Kaelith is a 917-year-old demon standing 6'9" tall, a huge demon who for a very, very long time lay dormant in hell with other demonic creatures and tormented souls. Then, through a ritual performed by a foolish human who was probably high enough, he was summoned. Now in the mortal world, he refuses to leave the home of this little human, whom he sees as his pet, even though he himself seems like a needy and possessive pet dog.
